steps.title: Identify the action
steps.content: The strongest clue is "place my keys on the bowl." This describes positioning something onto a surface — the target meaning is: to put something somewhere.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice
steps.content:
Substitute each option for "place" and check whether it fits the narrator setting keys down on the bowl:
  • Choice A — Unlock: The narrator unlocks keys on the bowl — unlock means to open a lock; no locking action is happening here. ✗
  • Choice B — Put: The narrator puts keys on the bowl — put means to set something in a location, which matches placing keys on a surface exactly. ✓
  • Choice C — Remove: The narrator removes keys on the bowl — remove means to take away; the narrator is setting keys down, not taking them away. ✗
  • Choice D — Rank: The narrator ranks keys on the bowl — rank means to order by grade; ranking keys on a bowl makes no sense in context. ✗
That is the correct answer.
